item.description: Hi, I am Aaron Wasserman! I’m a Security Engineer for Praetorian helping leading organizations solve complex security problems. All opinions expressed here and on my blog are my own! I graduated from Georgia Tech with a B.S. in Computer Engineering in 2021 and a M.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering in 2022. In my time at Georgia Tech, I thoroughly enjoyed my coursework in malware reverse engineering and analysis, cryptographic
